input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  logs=$(kubectl logs -n spark-streaming -l app=traffic-generator --tail=10 2>&1)
  echo "$(date '+%H:%M:%S') $logs"
  if echo "$logs" | grep -q "PHASE 2"; then
    echo "=== PHASE 2 DETECTED ==="
    break
  fi
  sleep 3
done

content.text: Scaling in progress (5/10 ready). Now polling for Phase 3.

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  logs=$(kubectl logs -n spark-streaming -l app=traffic-generator --tail=10 2>&1)
  workers=$(kubectl get deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming -o jsonpath='{.status.readyReplicas}' 2>&1)
  echo "$(date '+%H:%M:%S') workers_ready=$workers | $logs"
  if echo "$logs" | grep -q "PHASE 3"; then
    echo "=== PHASE 3 DETECTED ==="
    break
  fi
  sleep 3
done

content.text: Scaling to 20 in progress (10/20 ready). Now polling for Phase 4.

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 80); do
  logs=$(kubectl logs -n spark-streaming -l app=traffic-generator --tail=10 2>&1)
  workers=$(kubectl get deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming -o jsonpath='{.status.readyReplicas}' 2>&1)
  echo "$(date '+%H:%M:%S') workers_ready=$workers | $logs"
  if echo "$logs" | grep -q "PHASE 4"; then
    echo "=== PHASE 4 DETECTED ==="
    break
  fi
  sleep 3
done
